test-code.description: [GOOD]: pure JUnit 4 test class with runner
[GOOD]: pure JUnit 5 test class with fully-qualified annotations
[BAD]: JUnit 5 import mixed with fully-qualified JUnit 4 annotation
[BAD]: fully-qualified JUnit 4 and JUnit 5 annotations without imports
[BAD]: JUnit 4 runner mixed with JUnit 5 lifecycle annotation
[BAD]: static imports of JUnit 4 and JUnit 5 assertions
